title: Cyclodium serra
intro: Cyclodium serra, also known as serrated shield fern or serrated cyclocodium, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate pain and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Cyclodium serra include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Cyclodium serra is often prepared as a tea or used in combination with other herbs in formulas designed to tonify the kidneys and promote overall well-being.
